## 3. Scope

### What We're Building
Automate bi-weekly status mail, issue log maintenance, meeting records, and next-step extraction.

### What We're NOT Building

- Replacing all incumbent planning and execution systems.
- General-purpose PM automation beyond the evidence-backed operating-rhythm wedge.

## 5. Out of Scope (Boundaries)

- Replacing all incumbent planning and execution systems.
- General-purpose PM automation beyond the evidence-backed operating-rhythm wedge.
